title: Sea of Jarad
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Sea of Jarad''' was a stormy body of water on [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] located far from the equator. Human and Selonian settlements on the shores of the Sea of Jarad were quaint throwbacks to earlier times. The sea was a mating ground for [[styanax]], and the hunting of these creatures was an important part of the Tralus' culture. Human clans and Selonian dens gathered together and organized parties of [[stabmen]], or styanax hunters, who tracked and harpooned the creatures from unpowered, oared vessels called [[nagak]]s.
